brandVoice: Precise, hopeful, clean. Soft-sci-fi lab TCG tone. Short Signal-focused hooks; operator depth on Facebook. Minimal neon slang; no grimdark.
audience: TCG players who enjoy sci-fi aesthetics, deck builders, collectors, robot and mecha fans

image.promptSuffix: Square 1:1 social promo art for a soft-sci-fi lab TCG, clean laboratory lighting, pale steel and cyan accents, hopeful mood, no text, no watermark, atmospheric depth, leave corner space for logo overlay.
